title: adesmia aurantiaca
intro: Adesmia aurantiaca, also known as the orange pea, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Adesmia aurantiaca can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
